rationale: The cited 2008 paper appears conceptually central rather than incidental: it studies attraction/compromise context effects and proposes a choice-construction (context-specific rule learning) mechanism, which closely overlaps with the 2018 paper’s hierarchical strategy account and its process tests on attribute-importance/trade-off processing. Given this strong construct/mechanism alignment in the notes (not just topical similarity), this pair is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
